ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democratic, authoritarian) */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region is part of */,
  "geographical_description" TEXT /* Detailed geographical description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "gdp_usd" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the income group in USD */,
  "gdp_per_capita_usd" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the income group in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_stats" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics apply to */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "manpower_available" INTEGER /* Manpower available for the military */,
  "total_military_personnel" INTEGER /* Total military personnel */,
  "active_personnel" INTEGER /* Active military personnel */,
  "reserve_personnel" INTEGER /* Reserve military personnel */,
  "aircraft_strength" INTEGER /* Total aircraft strength */,
  "fighter_aircraft" INTEGER /* Number of fighter aircraft */,
  "attack_aircraft" INTEGER /* Number of attack aircraft */,
  "helicopter_strength" INTEGER /* Total helicopter strength */,
  "attack_helicopters" INTEGER /* Number of attack helicopters */,
  "total_military_spending_usd" TEXT /* Total military spending in USD */,
  "defense_budget_usd" TEXT /* Annual defense budget in USD */,
  "navy_strength" INTEGER /* Number of naval vessels */,
  "tank_strength" INTEGER /* Number of tanks */,
  "artillery_strength" INTEGER /* Number of artillery pieces */,
  "missile_strength" INTEGER /* Number of missiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "primary_region" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the region is the primary region for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_income_groups" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "income_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income group */,
  "primary_income_group" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the income group is the primary income group for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "income_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country by military strength */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking applies to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., overall military strength, air power, naval power) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "year", "category")
)
column_names: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country
Total area of the country in square kilometers
Continent the region is part of
Detailed geographical description of the region
Unique identifier for each income group
Gross Domestic Product of the income group in USD
GDP per capita of the income group in USD
Flag indicating if the region is the primary region for the country
Flag indicating if the income group is the primary income group for the country
Rank of the country by military strength
Category of the ranking (e.g., overall military strength, air power, naval power)
